description: Style Note Pared down to the basics, this kurta from alma is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories. Product Details Blue printed kurta with a mandarin collar and a V-neckline, three fabric hook and button closures on the yoke, ethnic print on the shoulder, three fourth sleeves with  printed white piping on the sleeve hem and a vented hem  Material and Care Blended cotton Machine wash Wash dark colours separately Dry in shade Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
